item.title: Shriram Finance Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Price Action
item.description: Shriram Finance Ltd, a leading large-cap NBFC, witnessed a notable 11.2% rise in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment on 19 Mar 2026, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning despite a marginal dip in its stock price. This surge in OI, coupled with increased delivery volumes and mixed moving average signals, offers a nuanced view of market sentiment and potential directional bets on the stock. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: LTIMindtree Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bearish Price Action
item.description: LTIMindtree Ltd (LTM) has witnessed a notable 10.7% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock’s recent underperformance. This surge in open interest, coupled with falling prices and declining investor participation, suggests a complex interplay of positioning and directional bets among traders in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Gujarat Mineral Development Corporation Ltd. Sees Surge in Value Trading Amid Downgrade
item.description: Gujarat Mineral Development Corporation Ltd. (GMDCLTD) emerged as one of the most actively traded stocks by value on 20 March 2026, registering a robust 10.77% gain in a session marked by strong sectoral momentum. The small-cap minerals and mining company outperformed its sector peers and broader market indices, driven by heightened institutional interest and significant order flow, signalling renewed investor confidence despite a recent downgrade in its Mojo Grade. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: PC Jeweller Ltd Sees Exceptional Volume Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: PC Jeweller Ltd, a small-cap player in the Gems, Jewellery and Watches sector, witnessed one of the highest trading volumes on 20 March 2026, with over 1.73 crore shares changing hands. Despite a modest 1.19% gain in price, the stock remains close to its 52-week low, reflecting underlying market caution amid rising investor participation and mixed technical signals. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex Advances Nearly 1% as Banking and Metals Drive Market Rally
item.description: Indian equity markets advanced steadily on 20 Mar 2026, with the Sensex rising 693.90 points or 0.94% to close at 74,901.14. The rally was broad-based as all 37 sectors on the BSE advanced, led by the NIFTYPSUBANK sector which surged 3.15%. Large caps led the charge while mid and small caps also posted healthy gains, supported by positive global cues and sustained domestic buying interest. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Shows Resilient Gains Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has demonstrated notable resilience in recent trading sessions, registering a gain of 0.95% on 20 Mar 2026. This performance underscores the segment’s continued appeal amid a mixed market backdrop, with sectoral trends and breadth indicators providing a nuanced picture of underlying momentum. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Advances 1.05% Led by JSW Steel; Defensive HDFC Bank Lags
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, recorded a modest gain of 1.05% on 20 Mar 2026, driven primarily by cyclical sectors and heavyweight movers. While the majority of stocks advanced, defensive names such as HDFC Bank underperformed, highlighting a divergence in investor sentiment amid evolving market dynamics. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Shines with 1.23% Gain Led by Lloyds Metals
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE MIDCAP 150 index, continued its robust performance with a 1.23% gain on 20 Mar 2026, outperforming many broader market indices. This marks a sustained upward trend, with the index also rising 0.99% over the past five trading sessions, underscoring renewed investor confidence in mid-sized companies amid mixed sectoral dynamics. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Inox Wind Ltd Surges 7.3% to Day's High of Rs 83.2 — Outperforms Sector by 2 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex climbed 1.31% on 20 Mar 2026, yet Inox Wind Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.3% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 83.2. This 1.99 percentage-point outperformance over the Renewable Energy sector’s 4.43% advance highlights a stock-specific surge rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Bank of Maharashtra Rallies 5.78% and Approaches 50 DMA Resistance — A Key Technical Test Ahead
item.description: The Sensex climbed 1.31% on 20 Mar 2026, yet Bank of Maharashtra surged 5.78%, outperforming its Public Sector Bank peers by 2.48 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain, with the stock touching an intraday high of Rs 66.3 (5.88%), signals a notable shift in momentum that demands closer scrutiny. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Pidilite Industries Ltd Surges 3.37% to Day's High of Rs 1356.55 — Outperforms Sector by 2.51 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex climbed 1.31% on 20 Mar 2026, yet Pidilite Industries Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 3.37% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 1356.55. This 2.51 percentage-point outperformance over its Specialty Chemicals sector peers signals a stock-specific strength rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: ITC Ltd. Rallies 3.15% and Approaches Key Moving Averages — A Technical Test in Focus
item.description: The Sensex climbed 1.31% on 20 Mar 2026, yet ITC Ltd. outperformed with a 3.15% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 308. This 1.84-percentage-point outperformance signals a stock-specific strength rather than a broad market lift, raising the question of whether this surge marks a genuine recovery or a technical bounce within a larger downtrend. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Jayaswal Neco Industries Ltd Surges 8.19% to Day's High of Rs 77.12 — Outperforms Sector by 4.3 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex climbed 1.31% on 20 Mar 2026, yet Jayaswal Neco Industries Ltd outpaced both the benchmark and its sector, rallying 8.19% to touch an intraday high of Rs 77.12. This 4.3-percentage-point outperformance over the Steel/Sponge Iron/Pig Iron sector’s 3.89% gain signals a distinctly stock-specific surge rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: Som Distilleries & Breweries Ltd Surges 7.8% to Day's High of Rs 77.43 — Outperforms Sector by 6.99 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.31% on 20 Mar 2026, yet Som Distilleries & Breweries Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.8% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 77.43. This 6.99 percentage-point outperformance over the Beverages sector signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But MT Educare Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: MT Educare Ltd’s share price declined to a fresh 52-week low of ₹1.28 on 20 Mar 2026, marking a significant downturn for the micro-cap company within the Other Consumer Services sector. This new low comes amid a series of financial and market challenges that have weighed on the stock’s performance over the past year. Time: 47 minutes ago

item.title: Cartrade Tech Ltd Surges 7.06% to Day's High of Rs 1767 — Outperforms Sector by 5.23 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex climbed 1.26% on 20 Mar 2026, yet Cartrade Tech Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.06% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 1767. This 5.23 percentage-point outperformance over its E-Retail/ E-Commerce sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Advait Energy Transitions Limited Surges 7.03% to Day's High of Rs 1709.25 — Outperforms Sector by 4.68 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.26% on 20 Mar 2026, yet Advait Energy Transitions Limited outpaced the broader market with a 7.03% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 1709.25. This 4.68-percentage-point outperformance over its sector peers in Cables - Electricals signals a notable stock-specific momentum shift rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: IDBI Bank Ltd. Surges 5.13% to Day's High of Rs 73.8 — Outperforms Sector by 2.08 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex climbed 1.26% on 20 Mar 2026, yet IDBI Bank Ltd. outpaced both the benchmark and its sector peers with a 5.13% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 73.8. This 2.08-percentage-point outperformance over the Public Banks sector’s 3.05% advance signals a stock-specific strength rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Shaily Engineering Plastics Ltd Surges 8.04% to Day's High of Rs 2501.5 — Outperforms Sector by 7.11 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 1.26% on 20 Mar 2026, yet Shaily Engineering Plastics Ltd outpaced the broader market with an 8.04% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 2501.5. This 7.11 percentage-point outperformance over its Plastic Products - Industrial sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific surge rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Steel Strips Wheels Ltd Surges 7.62% to Day's High of Rs 194.2 — Outperforms Sector by 5.52 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex climbed 1.26% on 20 Mar 2026, yet Steel Strips Wheels Ltd outpaced the broader market with a robust 7.62% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 194.2. This 5.52 percentage-point outperformance over its Auto Components & Equipments sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 56 minutes ago
